chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1871 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 10.12.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Petitioner, namely Sanaullah Dharejo is present in person. Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Jakhar, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Khan Muhammad Shaikh, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that this Petition has been filed only in respect of directions to the trial Court to expedite and conclude the trial within a shortest period of time, as the case is pending trial since, 2017. Learned Assistant AG conceded such position and submits that it is right of every citizen that trial, if any, pending against him shall be concluded within a shortest period of time. Under these circumstances, we dispose of this petition and direct the learned trial Court to expedite the trial and conclude it within a period of three months positively Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
